docs.title: Commands
docs.text: This page lists popular pat.xyz links. Here is how it works. Open a new tab and type pat.xyz/{command} using any of the commands below.

docs.title: Public
docs.text: pat.xyz Command Description pat.xyz/acronis-v16 acronis-v16 Acronis Cyber Protect V16 pat.xyz/acronis-v17 acronis-v17 Acronis Cyber Protect V17 pat.xyz/acronis acronis Acronis Cyber Protect Download Portal pat.xyz/adobe-reader adobe-reader Adobe Acrobat Reader
